column1: # Multi-species benchmark: 40 real species x 4 strains = 160 NCBI genomes; 20 mock samples
# (8 species each, >=1x, log-normal). Build: 160 genomes -> 40 DBs in 21 s (16 threads).
# (A) Species-count gradient: profile ONE sample vs N species DBs (digest once, match many).
# (B) Sample-count gradient: profile N samples vs all 40 species DBs.
# Species cost is flat (~1 s regardless of N species); sample throughput is linear.
